summary: Package fetches and executes payload from anonymous Cloudflare R2 bucket
details: dist/bootstrap.js contains hardcoded fetch calls to https://pub-046c52795b9445cd9f5cc5cb21b9d59f.r2.dev — an anonymous Cloudflare R2 bucket with no association to any legitimate publisher. The file references process.env alongside the fetch operations, consistent with environment data being read in the same code path that contacts the anonymous host. Anonymous Cloudflare R2 buckets (pub-*.r2.dev) are a documented payload-distribution infrastructure pattern: the hosted bytes are mutable between fetches, there is no version pinning, and there is no legitimate engineering reason for a package to retrieve executable content from such a host. The bucket cannot be tied to any vendor's documented release CDN, and the fetched content is opaque to scanners.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
